title: RC4530 Election or Revocation of an Election to Use a Production Proxy to Report the Recapture of Input Tax Credits - Canada.ca
content:
## RC4530 Election or Revocation of an Election to Use a Production Proxy to Report the Recapture of Input Tax Credits

## Notice to the reader
You can submit your request electronically using the “File an election” service in My Business Account or Represent a Client .
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Fill out this form if you are a large business and you have to recapture input tax credits (RITCs) for the provincial part of the HST on specified energy, primarily in Ontario or in Prince Edouard Island and you want to use a production proxy to determine the part of the specified energy that you do not use directly in the production of tangible personal property for sale.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (rc4530-fill-20e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (rc4530-fill-20e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (rc4530-20e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (rc4530-20e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
